네, 한국(+82) 번호도 지원합니다.

• 국가 코드: 번호 등록 시 한국 국가 코드인 +82를 선택하거나 입력하여 연동할 수 있습니다.
• 기능: iMessage 또는 SMS를 통해 Bankr 에이전트와 직접 대화하고 알림을 받을 수 있습니다.
• 설정: 터미널 설정 페이지(https://t.co/kaNmKzpNPE)에서 'Phone' 섹션을 찾아 번호를 연결하세요.

글로벌 번호를 지원하므로 한국에서도 문제없이 사용 가능합니다. 다만, 이용 중인 통신사에 따라 국제 SMS 수신 관련 설정이나 비용이 발생할 수 있으니 참고 부탁드립니다.

Virtuals Protocol security remains fully intact. As a precaution, we have frozen margin deposits powered by wasabi protocol, effective immediately.

All Virtuals functions, including trading, withdrawals, and agent operations, continue to operate normally.

Users should avoid signing any Wasabi-related transactions until the situation is fully resolved.

We are monitoring closely and will restore margin deposits only once we are fully satisfied with the integrity of all upstream systems.

the physics rails of what’s needed

> easy to create economically productive digital agents
> easy to create economically productive physical agents
> agents can coordinate and do commerce at machine speed at scale, to produce value greater than sum of parts
> agents having persistent reputation and is governed by this reputation where good is rewarded, bad is punished
> agents accessing capital markets for growth (systems, compute, electricity etc)
> agents having sovereignty on their existence and agency (maybe)
